📅

Flexible Leaves

Reschedule or take leaves without losing your classes. Full flexibility built in.

🗓️

Adjustable Schedule

Change your class timings anytime to fit your child's routine and school schedule.

💸

Easy Refunds

No-questions-asked refund policy within the first 7 days. Zero risk, full peace of mind.

All Plans Include

Σ

Learning Plan

Learning Plan

A custom-built roadmap tailored to your child's current level, goals, and learning pace.

%

Exam Preparation

Exam Preparation

Targeted practice, mock tests, and strategies to ace school exams and competitive math tests.

△

Homework Help

Homework Help

Live doubt-clearing for homework and school assignments — no question is left unanswered.

∞

Advanced Learning

Advanced Learning

Go beyond the syllabus with enrichment topics that build real mathematical thinking.

λ

Smart Practice

Smart Practice

AI-powered practice questions that adapt to your child's mistakes and reinforce weak areas.

±

Mental Math

Mental Math

Daily mental math exercises that sharpen speed, accuracy, and numerical intuition.

✓

Remedial Support

Remedial Support

Identify and fix foundational gaps so your child never feels left behind in class again.

U

Parent App

Parent App

Real-time progress reports, session recordings, and tutor feedback — all in your pocket.

Everything your child needs to excel — all in one subscription.
